# storeCategory

**Instance Property**

The current log entry’s storage tag.

## Declaration

```swift
var storeCategory: OSLogEntry.StoreCategory { get }
```

## Accessing Store Categories

- **OSLogEntry.StoreCategory**: A classification of how the entry was to be stored and rotated at the point when it was created.
